name: fsc-claims-process
description: End-to-end FSC Insurance claims lifecycle — FNOL, adjudication, fraud/STP, reserves, payments, OmniStudio

compliance.notes: Claim records contain PII (claimant names, addresses, financial data) and PHI in life/disability claims. Queries returning claim data should use minimum necessary fields.

boundary: Health Cloud CarePlan — use health-cloud/care-management skill
Revenue Cloud / CPQ pricing — use sales/revenue-cloud skill
FSC Wealth Management (FinancialAccount, goals, AUM) — use industries/fsc/wealth-management skill
FSC Mortgage Origination — use industries/fsc/mortgage-origination skill
Generic Service Cloud Case (non-claims) — use service/case-lifecycle skill

changelog.summary: Initial release — full claims lifecycle coverage including FNOL, adjudication, fraud/STP, reserves, payments, OmniStudio, documents, data migration
